extName.message: TabRest - Rest your tabs, free your RAM

extDescription.message: Rest your tabs, free your memory - automatically unload inactive tabs

copyTabListTooltip.description: Tooltip for copy tab list button

tabListCopied.description: Toast message when tab list is copied

cannotUnloadActive.description: Toast message when trying to unload the current active tab

failedToSave.description: Toast message when session save fails

settingsSubtitle.message: Fine-tune how TabRest manages your tabs and memory

whitelistHelp.message: Sites that will never be unloaded automatically

invalidDomain.message: Enter a domain, IP address, or 'localhost'
invalidDomain.description: Error message when whitelist/blacklist input is invalid

domainConflict.message: $1 is already in $2 — remove it from there first
domainConflict.description: Error when adding a domain that exists in the opposite list

blacklistHelp.message: Sites that will always be unloaded automatically (even if active recently)

selectTabGroup.description: Placeholder option in tab group selector

unloadGroup.description: Button label to unload all tabs in a group

untitledTabGroup.description: Fallback label for tab group without a title

prefixHelp.message: Requires website access permission. Does not work on protected pages (Chrome Web Store, Google accounts, etc.)

prefixPermDenied.message: Tab prefix requires website access permission. Toggle skipped.
prefixPermDenied.description: Toast when user denies optional host permission for discarded-tab prefix

minTabsLabel.message: Only auto-unload when inactive tabs exceed:

toolbarAction.description: Section header for toolbar action settings

useSidePanel.message: Open in side panel instead of popup

useSidePanelHelp.message: Side panel stays open across tab switches. Requires Chrome 114+.

saveYouTubeHelp.message: Resume videos from saved position when tab reloads

onlyDiscardWhenIdle.message: Only auto-unload when computer is idle

perTabMemoryLabel.message: Unload tabs using more than (JS heap):

perTabMemoryHelp.message: Measures JavaScript memory only, not total tab memory

powerModeHelp.message: Adjust aggressiveness based on your power situation

skipWhenOfflineHelp.message: Prevents tabs from being discarded when network is unavailable

restoreScrollHelp.message: Saves and restores scroll position when tabs are discarded and reloaded

tabSnoozed.description: Toast message when tab is snoozed

domainSnoozed.description: Toast message when domain is snoozed

snoozeRemoved.description: Toast message when snooze is cancelled

openLinkSuspended.description: Context menu item for opening link in suspended state

copyForGithub.description: Button to copy report and open GitHub

errorReportingHelp.message: Automatically report crashes to help improve TabRest. No personal data collected.

closeDuplicates.description: Button to close duplicate tabs in current window

searchTabs.description: Tooltip for tab search toggle button

searchPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text for tab search input

ramEstimateTooltip.message: Based on ~150 MB per discarded tab. Actual savings vary by page content.
ramEstimateTooltip.description: Tooltip explaining the RAM saved estimate

formProtectPermDenied.message: Form protection requires website access permission. Toggle skipped.
formProtectPermDenied.description: Toast when user denies optional host permission for form protection

formPermBannerText.message: Site permissions were reset. Enable to restore affected settings.
formPermBannerText.description: Banner shown after upgrade when host permission was implicitly revoked

formPermGranted.description: Toast after user grants permission via recovery banner

showSuspendWarningLabel.description: Options checkbox label for the on-page warning toast

showSuspendWarningHelp.message: Displays a brief on-page toast so you can interact with the tab to keep it alive
showSuspendWarningHelp.description: Help text under the suspend warning toggle

suspendWarningDelayLabel.description: Label for the suspend warning delay select

suspendWarningMessage.message: TabRest will suspend this tab to free memory…
suspendWarningMessage.description: Toast message shown on page before auto-suspend

exportList.description: Button label to export a domain list to clipboard

importList.description: Button label to import a domain list from clipboard

exportSessions.description: Button label to export sessions to clipboard

importSessions.description: Button label to import sessions from clipboard

importFailed_invalidJson.description: Toast when imported text is not valid JSON

importFailed_invalidShape.description: Toast when imported JSON has wrong structure

importFailed_unsupportedVersion.description: Toast when imported JSON uses an unsupported schema version

importFailed_wrongType.message: Import failed: wrong type for this list
importFailed_wrongType.description: Toast when imported type does not match (e.g. blacklist into whitelist)

errorReportingHint.message: Help improve TabRest by sending anonymous error reports. Disabled by default. No URLs, page titles, or personal data are sent.
errorReportingHint.description: Hint text under the privacy section header

enableErrorReportingLabel.description: Checkbox label for error reporting toggle

advancedDsnSummary.description: Summary label for the advanced DSN collapsible block

customDsnHint.message: Leave empty to use the default. Only HTTPS DSNs are accepted.
customDsnHint.description: Hint text under the custom DSN input

viewPrivacyPolicy.description: Link text to privacy policy section

invalidDsnMessage.description: Inline validation error for malformed DSN input

dsnSavedMessage.description: Toast after custom DSN is saved successfully

errorReportingEnabledToast.description: Toast when user enables error reporting

errorReportingDisabledToast.description: Toast when user disables error reporting

sendToSentry.description: Button label to send bug report directly to Sentry

sentryDisabledHint.description: Hint text shown when Sentry reporting is disabled (followed by options link)

optionsLink.description: Link text in Sentry disabled hint pointing to options page

reportSentSuccess.description: Toast shown after successful Sentry bug report submission

reportSentFailed.message: Failed to send. Try GitHub copy instead.
reportSentFailed.description: Toast shown when Sentry bug report submission fails

reportCooldown.message: Please wait a minute before sending another report.
reportCooldown.description: Toast shown when user submits bug reports too quickly

reportDailyCap.message: Daily report limit reached. Use GitHub copy instead.
reportDailyCap.description: Toast shown when user has reached daily manual report cap

optionsRerunOnboarding.description: Options page footer link to reopen the onboarding wizard

obSkipAll.description: Header link to close the entire onboarding wizard without configuring

obWelcomeBody.message: A quick setup tunes TabRest for the way you browse. You can change anything later in Settings.

obAutoUnloadDesc.message: Pick how long an inactive tab waits before being unloaded.

obWhitelistDesc.message: Sites you check are protected from auto-unload.

obWhitelistHint.message: You can edit this list later in Settings.

obNotificationsDesc.message: Show a system notification when TabRest unloads tabs in the background.

obNotificationsToggle.message: Notify me when tabs are auto-unloaded

obPinTitle.description: Done step pin reminder card title (not pinned yet)

obPinDesc.message: Click the puzzle icon in the top-right of your browser, then pin TabRest for one-click access.
obPinDesc.description: Done step pin reminder card description (not pinned yet)

obPinnedTitle.description: Done step pin card title after the user has pinned the extension

obPinnedDesc.message: Click the TabRest icon any time to manage your tabs.
obPinnedDesc.description: Done step pin card description after the user has pinned the extension

obDoneSummaryDelay.description: Done step summary row label for delay

obDoneSummaryWhitelist.description: Done step summary row label for whitelist count

obDoneSummaryWhitelistN.description: Done step summary value for whitelist count

obDoneSummaryPowerMode.description: Done step summary row label for power mode

obDoneSummaryNotifs.description: Done step summary row label for notifications

obDoneOpenSettings.description: Done step link to options page

obOnState.description: Generic on indicator for done summary

obOffState.description: Generic off indicator for done summary

obMinutes.description: Duration in minutes for done summary

obHours.description: Duration in hours for done summary
